Variables.Name: MappingType
Variables.Description: Determines the mapping place to use on the terrain.

Variables.Name: CustomUVType
Variables.Description: Determines the mapping place to use on the terrain.

Variables.Name: MappingScale
Variables.Description: Uniform scale to apply to the mapping.

Variables.Name: MappingRotation
Variables.Description: Rotation to apply to the mapping.

Variables.Name: MappingPanU
Variables.Description: Offset to apply to the mapping along U.

Variables.Name: MappingPanV
Variables.Description: Offset to apply to the mapping along V.
